image_prompt: A dynamic and slightly abstract depiction of time's relentless movement. The background is a vibrant, blurred cityscape transitioning from a golden hour sunset to twilight, suggesting the passage of hours. In the foreground, a collection of antique and modern timepieces: a grandfather clock with its pendulum swinging, a sleek digital watch displaying rapidly changing numbers, and an ornate hourglass with sand actively flowing. A central, elegant pocket watch is open, its intricate gears visibly turning. The Portuguese sentence "O tempo não para." is subtly integrated, perhaps etched onto the glass of the hourglass, or appearing as shimmering, ethereal text that flows across the scene, following the movement of time. The overall aesthetic is sophisticated and contemplative.
caption: Tic-tac, tic-tac... E de repente, o dia já foi! ⏰ O tempo não para, mas a gente pode decidir como aproveitá-lo. Qual sua melhor dica para fazer cada segundo valer a pena? #OTempoNaoPara #AproveiteOMomento #CarpeDiem #TempoPrecioso #ReflexaoDoDia #CoisasObvias
